sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80946" key="pe/prwtai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πέπρωται</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πέπρωτο</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπρωμένος</orth>, <sense id="n80946.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Πόρω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πέπτᾰμαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπτᾰμένος</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πετάννυμι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεπτεῶτα</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πίπτω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
